text: 4179 - وَ سَأَلَهُ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ : عَنْ ذَبِيحَةِ اَلْمُرْجِئِ وَ اَلْحَرُورِيِّ قَالَ فَقَالَ "كُلْ وَ قِرَّ وَ اِسْتَقِرَّ حَتَّى يَكُونَ مَا يَكُونُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4179 - Al-Halabi asked him about the slaughtered animal of the Murji'ite and the Haruri. Imam (as) said: "Eat, and be at ease and settled until whatever is to happen occurs."
